name: Kickoff — Booked Webhook
description: Receives POST from Next.js `/api/kickoff/book` when a lead books via the custom scheduler (`N8N_KICKOFF_BOOKED_WEBHOOK_URL`). Payload: type=kickoff_booked, hubspotContactId, hubspotDealId, calBookingUid, start, end, managementUrl, email. Wire this to HubSpot updates, Sheets, Slack, or email — same secret header as website intake when `N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET` is set.
